global_description: A small, slender bird with a light brown and gray plumage. It features a streaked crown and a pale face with a distinctive white eye-ring. The wings and tail are brown with subtle streaks, and the underparts are pale with fine streaking.

part_details.crown: Brown with dark streaks, blending into the back.
part_details.face: Pale with a prominent white eye-ring, small beak.
part_details.wings: Brown with subtle streaks, medium length.
part_details.tail: Brown, slightly forked, with faint streaks.
part_details.underparts: Pale with fine streaking, smooth texture.

spatial_relations: The streaked crown transitions into the back.
The white eye-ring encircles the eye on the pale face.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
